reproducibility.note: These reviewed PNG bytes are primary design-source inputs, not build-generated artifacts. Every runtime-selected file is packaged byte-for-byte with no derived conversion. Interactive creation history is provenance only and cannot recreate the selected bytes. Any resized, packed, compressed, or otherwise derived runtime asset must have a deterministic source-to-byte command before it is checked in.

runtimeIntegration.pathPolicy: Exact manifest paths below the executable assets directory; no host or source-checkout path is embedded.
runtimeIntegration.lifetimePolicy: Each valid LoadTexture result has one explicit owner and one UnloadTexture call before CloseWindow; copied Texture2D values are non-owning aliases.
runtimeIntegration.derivation: The five packaged files are exact primary bytes verified by SHA-256; no resize, atlas repack, compression, or format conversion occurs.

caxecraft-original.notice: Original Caxecraft visual design contributed under the repository license; no Minecraft or other game asset was used as an input.

adventure-characters.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 polished voxel-RPG character atlas: Haxirio, active engineer-princess Ceesh, and original crowned T-rex tyrant Browser with readable boss actions; teal, copper, orange, slate; no existing characters, logos, text, or watermark.
adventure-characters.processing: Selected built-in output, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

adventure-items.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 voxel-RPG icon atlas for the Tideweave Suit, compiler-themed powerups, four route glyphs, bridge puzzle parts, checkpoint, and Ceesh scroll; crisp readable silhouettes; no text, logos, or watermark.
adventure-items.processing: Selected built-in output, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

adventure-terrain.promptSummary: Original seamless 4x4 voxel material atlas for snow, ice, ash, basalt, pine, underwater ruins, castle, copper roof, and bridge runes; edge-to-edge square textures; no text, logos, or copied game textures.
adventure-terrain.processing: Selected built-in output and packed to 1024x1024 RGB.

entities.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 polished voxel-RPG atlas with four views each for friendly trailkeeper Moss, craftsmith Nia, hostile Mossling, and hostile Ember Wisp; distinct family-friendly silhouettes; no existing characters, text, or watermark.
entities.processing: Selected built-in output, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

hud.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 voxel-game HUD atlas for health, armor, stamina, food, hotbar states, backpack, crosshair, dialogue, quest, and damage feedback; high contrast, accessible shapes, no words, logos, or watermark.
hud.processing: Selected the violet-key iteration, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

items.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 voxel-game inventory atlas for basic blocks, tools, copper sword, materials, food, map, lantern, herbs, and quest token; readable at small size; no text, logos, or watermark.
items.processing: Selected built-in output, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

ivvy.promptSummary: Original transparent 4x4 warm voxel-RPG Siamese-cat companion atlas with cream coat, dark mask/ears/paws/tail, blue eyes, teal collar and amber tag; follow, alert, secret-point, retrieve, purr, bubble-collar, cover, sleep, and victory poses; no text or watermark.
referenceInputs: Private user-provided family-cat photograph used only as visual reference; not included in or distributed from this repository.
ivvy.processing: Selected built-in output, removed the flat chroma key with the installed border-key soft-matte/despill helper, and packed to 1024x1024 RGBA.

terrain.promptSummary: Original seamless 4x4 voxel material atlas for meadow, soil, slate, sand, teal water, oak, leaves, planks, cobble, brick, ores, and foundation rock; edge-to-edge square textures; no text, logos, or copied game textures.
terrain.processing: Selected built-in output and packed to 1024x1024 RGB.

wordmark.promptSummary: Original opaque CAXECRAFT engineering wordmark on a dark navy field: cyan circuit-trace C, orange diagonal split-stroke X, warm-white angular letters; no stone, soil, grass, moss, cubic construction typography, existing-game treatment, official Haxe glyph, extra text, or watermark.
wordmark.processing: Selected the built-in output and losslessly normalized its PNG container metadata; retained as a 1983x793 RGB primary design source.

panorama.promptSummary: Original wide cinematic Caxecraft title panorama with warm voxel valley, river, village, distant castle, teal/copper hero accents, friendly original creature, and amber crystals; appealing family-adventure lighting; no text, logos, or copied game composition.
panorama.processing: Selected built-in output and packed to 1600x900 RGB.
